query: SELECT TOP 2000 pl_name,hostname,pl_orbper,pl_rvamp,pl_orbeccen,pl_bmassj,sy_dist,sy_vmag,rastr,decstr,disc_year,disc_facility,st_mass,st_teff,st_rad,discoverymethod,rv_flag,st_nrvc,rowupdate FROM ps WHERE default_flag = 1 AND rv_flag = 1 AND pl_orbper IS NOT NULL AND pl_rvamp IS NOT NULL AND pl_rvamp > 0 ORDER BY pl_rvamp DESC
selection_basis: Default confirmed planetary-system rows with detected radial velocity variation and a reported RV semi-amplitude, ordered by semi-amplitude descending.
analysis_note: Catalog fields are archival parameters. Simulated time-series and modeled diagnostics in the dashboard are labeled as such unless the user imports observed RV measurements.
